issues.title: Version of spring-ai-spring-boot-docker-compose not managed in BOM
issues.body: Hey, I noticed that `spring-ai-spring-boot-docker-compose` isn't managed in the BOM. Is this an oversight?

comments.body: thanks for the report, @iRecursion . There is another [PR](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/1312) to fix the dependency for cassandra starter
